site.title: ION Print & Promo | Real Estate Signs
site.description: Professional real estate sign services for real estate agents and brokers across Simcoe County. We design, print, install, and remove durable coroplast signs backed by 20+ years of experience (formerly Cardinal Signs & Gibson Digital Print).

hero.title: Real Estate Signs
hero.imageAlt: Real estate signs on a lawn

centreText.title: Your One-Stop Real Estate Sign Shop
centreText.description: From weather-resistant coroplast signs and sturdy posts to custom toppers, installation and take-down, we handle it all. Through our partnership with Cardinal Signs, formerly Gibson Digital Print, we bring over 20 years of trusted experience.

features.title: Sign Installs for Busy Realtors
features.description:
ION Print & Promo provides trusted real estate sign services for realtors, agents and brokerages.

  • Real estate sign installation
  • Sign take-downs
  • Custom toppers & sign printing
  • Service routes across Barrie & Simcoe County
features.imageAlt: Sign post installation in front yard

features.title: Post-Only Installations & Rentals
features.description:
Need a real estate post installed in Simcoe County, but already have your own sign? We offer post-only installation rentals for out-of-town realtors and agents.

  • Post installation & 90-day rental: $60 per post
  • Installs outside of Barrie: Additional $30 fee
  • Optional 90-day renewal: $40 per post
features.imageAlt: Real estate sign post ready for installation

features.title: Real Estate Printing
features.description:
We help realtors, agents and brokerages promote listings with durable signage and professional print materials.

  • Real estate signs, toppers & sold signs
  • Open house, directional signs & A-frames
  • Feature sheets, postcards & door hangers
  • Business cards, folders & brokerage materials

Our signs are printed on tough coroplast, with optional lamination for added durability.
features.imageAlt: Real estate coroplast lawn sign installation

features.title: Promo Products & Gifts
features.description:
Print & Promo helps sales agents and brokers create useful branded promo products and thoughtful client gifts that keep your name in front of buyers, sellers and neighbours.

  • Branded pens, notepads & magnets
  • Closing gifts & thank-you items
  • Open house giveaways
  • Key tags & home-related promo items
  • Brokerage-branded merchandise
features.imageAlt: Sign post installation in front yard

messages.note: Installation service is available within Simcoe County only. Distance pricing is based on the one-way driving distance from our Barrie office.

accordions.title: How do I sign up for real estate sign installation service?
accordions.content: Email kelly@iongroup.ca or call 705-739-1969 to get set up in our system, then email signs@iongroup.ca with your install details. Payment is required in advance before your very first install — after that, we invoice you once the install is complete.

accordions.title: Who do I email to request an install or take-down?
accordions.content: Email our coordinator Greg at signs@iongroup.ca. Greg checks install requests before 7 am, Monday–Friday, and schedules as soon as possible. Same-day installs within Barrie may be possible but are never guaranteed.

accordions.title: What information should I include in my install request?
accordions.content:
1. The address of the install, including the postal code.
  2. Any sign toppers you may need, such as "Coming Soon" or "10 Acres" (custom sign topper printing is extra and requires 2 business days).
  3. Please note that our installer must follow local by-laws and may have limited options for sign post placement.
  4. Make sure your for sale sign is at our Barrie location before the installation date.

accordions.title: What are your post-only installation rental terms
accordions.content: Renewal fees are waived when your signs are printed by ION Print & Promo. Posts will be removed after 90 days unless the rental is renewed, and missing or damaged posts will be charged to the client at $240 per post.

accordions.title: Can I leave my sign at the listing property for the installer?
accordions.content: No. All signs must be at our Barrie office at least one day before the installation. For the safety of our installer, signs cannot be left in garages, sheds, porches, or anywhere at the property — only signs brought to or stored at our Barrie office can be installed.

accordions.title: What regions do you cover for real estate sign installs?
accordions.content: We service Barrie, Orillia, Oro, Severn, Midland, Penetanguishene, Wasaga Beach, Angus, Springwater, and Innisfil.

accordions.title: How much does a real estate sign install cost?
accordions.content: Within Barrie, standard installs are $60. After that, the price increases based on distance from Barrie. There is currently a diesel fuel surcharge of $5 per install while fuel prices remain high.

accordions.title: Is the take-down included in the install price?
How much notice do you need for an installation?
accordions.content: Installs within Barrie can often be accommodated the same or next business day if we receive your email request before 7 am. Otherwise, 3–5 business days is recommended. You will be notified by email when your sign is scheduled. If you don't have a sign yet, call us and we can print one for you — starting at $75 for a double-sided, laminated, durable sign. Please note that installs only happen Monday–Friday. We are closed weekends and holidays.

accordions.title: How much notice do you need for a take-down before closing?
accordions.content: Please give us 8–10 business days for the sign take-down to be scheduled.

accordions.title: What days are installs completed in different service areas?
accordions.content:
• Within Barrie: Monday–Friday
  • Oro, Orillia, Severn, Midland & areas north of Barrie: Monday, Wednesday and/or Friday
  • Angus, Innisfil & south of Barrie: Tuesday and Thursday

accordions.title: Do you store real estate signs and posts?
accordions.content: Yes. There is an initial storage fee of $25. If you print your signs with us, we will waive the storage fee.

accordions.title: Do you put the SOLD toppers on the signs?
accordions.content: No. However, we do have complimentary SOLD sign toppers exclusively for our installation clients. Pick them up at no charge from our 178 Tiffin St. location. When we remove the sign, we return the topper to our inventory.

accordions.title: Can I order new signs, toppers or realtor print materials through ION Print & Promo?
accordions.content: Yes! We are your one-stop shop for all printing — feature sheets, open house signs, business cards, and more to grow your realty business and promote your listings.

accordions.title: How do I pay for sign installations?
accordions.content: You can e-transfer or pay online by credit card. Your invoice will include the necessary instructions.

accordions.title: Do you install signs in inclement weather?
accordions.content: We do our best, but the safety of our installer is always the priority.

cta.heading: Ready to put your listings in the spotlight?
